custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM component INNER JOIN nodeassociation ON (component.id = nodeassociation.sink_node_id) WHERE (nodeassociation.association_type = 'IssueComponent') AND (nodeassociation.source_node_entity = 'Issue') AND (nodeassociation.source_node_id = ?) AND (nodeassociation.sink_node_entity = 'Component')

SELECT {component.*} FROM component INNER JOIN nodeassociation ON (component.id = nodeassociation.sink_node_id) WHERE (nodeassociation.association_type = 'IssueComponent') AND (nodeassociation.source_node_entity = 'Issue') AND (nodeassociation.source_node_id = ?) AND (nodeassociation.sink_node_entity = 'Component')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM jiraissue INNER JOIN issuelink ON (jiraissue.id = issuelink.source) WHERE (issuelink.linktype = 10001) AND (issuelink.destination = ?) AND (jiraissue.security IS NULL)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM jiraissue INNER JOIN nodeassociation ON (jiraissue.id = nodeassociation.source_node_id) WHERE (nodeassociation.association_type = 'IssueFixVersion') AND (nodeassociation.source_node_entity = 'Issue') AND (nodeassociation.sink_node_entity = 'Version') AND (nodeassociation.sink_node_id = ?) AND (jiraissue.security IS NULL)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM jiraissue INNER JOIN label ON (jiraissue.id = label.issue) INNER JOIN project ON (jiraissue.project = project.id) WHERE (label.label = ?) AND (project.pkey = ?) AND (jiraissue.security IS NULL)
SELECT {jiraissue.*} FROM jiraissue INNER JOIN issuelink ON (jiraissue.id = issuelink.source) WHERE (issuelink.linktype = 10001) AND (issuelink.destination = ?) AND (jiraissue.security IS NULL)

SELECT {jiraissue.*} FROM jiraissue INNER JOIN nodeassociation ON (jiraissue.id = nodeassociation.source_node_id) WHERE (nodeassociation.association_type = 'IssueFixVersion') AND (nodeassociation.source_node_entity = 'Issue') AND (nodeassociation.sink_node_entity = 'Version') AND (nodeassociation.sink_node_id = ?) AND (jiraissue.security IS NULL)
SELECT {jiraissue.*} FROM jiraissue INNER JOIN project ON (jiraissue.project = project.id) WHERE (jiraissue.issuenum = ?) AND (project.pkey = ?) AND (jiraissue.security IS NULL)

SELECT {jiraissue.*} FROM jiraissue INNER JOIN label ON (jiraissue.id = label.issue) INNER JOIN project ON (jiraissue.project = project.id) WHERE (label.label = ?) AND (project.pkey = ?) AND (jiraissue.security IS NULL)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM projectversion WHERE (project = ?) AND (vname LIKE ?) AND (released = 'true') AND (archived IS NULL)
SELECT {projectversion.*} FROM projectversion WHERE (project = ?) AND (vname LIKE ?) AND (released = 'true') AND (archived IS NULL) ORDER BY vname ASC
